subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! At the beginning of Rabí'u'l-Avval in the year 1330, a sum of three hundred pounds which from Ṭihrán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء در بدایت ربیع الاول سنه ۱۳۳۰ مبلغ سیصد جنیه که از طهران
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @business; financial; property matters, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
